_publications._publicationTitle: Cognitive dysfunction in NF1 knock-out mice may result from altered vesicular trafficking of APP/DRD3 complex.

_contextSnippet: Four genes were dysregulated at more than one time point: Ate1, Tcfap2d, Rad51l1, Arhgap8. The lists of dysregulated genes include a myriad of genes including enzymes, receptors, channel molecules, and transcription factors.
details: Four genes were dysregulated at more than one time point: Ate1, Tcfap2d, Rad51l1, Arhgap8 across postnatal days 10, 15, and 20
